subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the Wronged One of the world unto one of the friends, that the fragrance of his letter may be wafted to the Dayspring of divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از مظلوم عالم بیکی از دوستان تا عرف نامه او را بمطلع نور احدیه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @Mosaic imagery, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
